text.title: API Authentication Worked Example
text.summary: Worked example: AUTH-PARTNER-API picks oauth2-client-credentials for b2b-partner with 60-min TTL and a revoke endpoint.

section.title: Scenario
section.p: A B2B partner integration needs to authenticate server-to-server with no user in the loop.

section.title: Output
section.code: { "spec_id": "AUTH-PARTNER-API", "scheme": "oauth2-client-credentials", "audience": "b2b-partner", "access_token_ttl_seconds": 3600, "refresh_token_rotates": false, "revocation_path": "POST /oauth/revoke; client_id+client_secret; cascades to introspection cache eviction", "key_rotation_cadence_days": 90 }
